mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment( order_idx, payment_mode, payment_request_amount, payment_paid_amount, payment_status, payment_expires_at ) VALUES ( #{orderIdx}, #{paymentMode}, #{paymentRequestAmount}, 0, 'READY', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE )
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET payment_status = 'IN_PROGRESS', payment_started_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
UPDATE payment SET payment_paid_amount = #{paymentPaidAmount}, payment_status = 'PAID', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
UPDATE payment SET payment_status = 'PAID', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
UPDATE payment SET payment_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
